name: Location Truth Unification
goal: Establish model_locations (priority: live > current > agency) as canonical product truth for all user-facing city display and filtering. models.city becomes legacy fallback only.

steps.name: Source-of-Truth Map
steps.description: Audit of all location-using surfaces documented in CURSOR_LOCATION_TRUTH_UNIFICATION_REPORT.md

steps.name: Filter Logic Verification
steps.notes: modelFilters.ts already correct (loc?.city || m.city). Discovery score now uses COALESCE.

do_not_touch: discovery ranking weights (only city-score source changed)
remaining_risks: Agency roster cards still show models.city (acceptable — agency-written value)
models.city can become stale when model self-sets city via model_locations only
Performance: effective_locations CTE adds LEFT JOIN to model_locations (lightweight)
